name: NV-07a
description: NV-07a is topical skin repair compound protecting skin from sun-induced immunosuppression and UV-induced damage.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in skin cancer and skin infections/disorders.
mechanismOfAction: Topical application of NV-07a shows an ability to undo the immediate effects of sunlight, such as reddening of the skin; and also to undo the underlying damage from exposure to sunlight which results in skin cancer.
